'''rajotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zecchine|zecchine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zecchine|zecchine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rajotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræjetheth|ræjetheth]] || [[word:ræjethej|ræjethej]] || [[word:ræjethesh|ræjethesh]] || [[word:ræjethe|ræjethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rajojothoth|rajojothoth]] || [[word:rajojothoj|rajojothoj]] || [[word:rajojothosh|rajojothosh]] || [[word:rajojotho|rajojotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rajothoth|rajothoth]] || [[word:rajothoj|rajothoj]] || [[word:rajothosh|rajothosh]] || [[word:rajotho|rajotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rajofthoth|rajofthoth]] || [[word:rajofthoj|rajofthoj]] || [[word:rajofthosh|rajofthosh]] || [[word:rajofthof|rajofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rajothotho|rajothotho]] || [[word:rajothojo|rajothojo]] || [[word:rajothosho|rajothosho]] || [[word:rajothoko|rajothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rajothoth|rajothoth]] || [[word:rajothoj|rajothoj]] || [[word:rajothosh|rajothosh]] || [[word:rajotho|rajotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rajothothol|rajothothol]] || [[word:rajothojol|rajothojol]] || [[word:rajothoshol|rajothoshol]] || [[word:rajothokol|rajothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rajothothotho|rajothothotho]] || [[word:rajothojojo|rajothojojo]] || [[word:rajothoshosho|rajothoshosho]] || [[word:rajothoko|rajothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rajothothon|rajothothon]] || [[word:rajothojon|rajothojon]] || [[word:rajothoshon|rajothoshon]] || [[word:rajothokon|rajothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rajothothoro|rajothothoro]] || [[word:rajothojoro|rajothojoro]] || [[word:rajothoshoro|rajothoshoro]] || [[word:rajothokoro|rajothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
